authselect_test_framework.fixtures

Pytest fixtures.

Functions

datadir(request)

Data directory shared for all tests.

moduledatadir(datadir, request)

Data directory shared for all tests within a single module.

profile(mh_topology_mark)

Current authselect profile for parametrized topology tests.

testdatadir(moduledatadir, request)

Data directory for current test.
authselect_test_framework.fixtures.datadir(request: FixtureRequest) → str

Data directory shared for all tests.

Returns:

Path to the data directory (root-pytest-dir)/data.

Return type:

str

authselect_test_framework.fixtures.moduledatadir(datadir: str, request: FixtureRequest) → str

Data directory shared for all tests within a single module.

Returns:

Path to the data directory (root-pytest-dir)/data/$module_name.

Return type:

str

authselect_test_framework.fixtures.testdatadir(moduledatadir: str, request: FixtureRequest) → str

Data directory for current test.

Returns:

Path to the data directory (root-pytest-dir)/data/$module_name/$test_name.

Return type:

str

authselect_test_framework.fixtures.profile(mh_topology_mark: TopologyMark) → Profile

Current authselect profile for parametrized topology tests.

Returns:

Profile enum member (Profile.Local, Profile.SSSD, or Profile.Winbind).

Return type:

Profile
